properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

state.description: Overall state of the pre-migration validation

validationResult.description: Detailed validation result for this check

ProvisioningState.description: The provisioning state of the resource.

values.name: InProgress
values.description: The validation is currently in progress.

ReadinessStatus.description: The readiness status of a check.

values.name: Succeeded
values.description: The check completed successfully without issues.

SslMode.description: The SSL mode for database connection.

values.name: Disable
values.description: SSL is disabled. If the server requires SSL, the connection will fail.

values.name: Allow
values.description: Prefer non-SSL connections if the server allows them, but allow SSL connections.

values.name: Prefer
values.description: Prefer SSL connections if the server allows them, but allow connections without SSL.

values.name: Require
values.description: Fail the connection if the server doesn't support SSL.

values.name: VerifyCA
values.description: Fail the connection if the server doesn't support SSL. Also verifies server certificate.

values.name: VerifyFull
values.description: Fail the connection if the server doesn't support SSL. Also verifies server certificate with host's name.

diagnosticHint.description: Diagnostic hint to help resolve issues

ValidationResult.description: Validation result for a pre-migration check.
